full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #30 (2026-05-13)

PULSE
Health: 0.635 (B). 931 wallets, 190 contributors. 178 memos today vs 141 avg. Velocity rising.

FLOW
100 reward payments, 699769 PFT distributed to 33 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (87142 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 8,500 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (61,600 PFT, avg 8,800/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (73 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (19.5 memos/day in 2 days). 32 new wallet(s) this week. 32 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 78.7%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-13): 7394 transactions from 76 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
